findings.issue: Hardcoded payment token in production config
findings.recommended_fix: Replace the inline payment_token with a vault or environment-secret reference in the production configuration.

findings.issue: Production external API URL uses insecure HTTP
findings.recommended_fix: Change the production external_api_url to use TLS, e.g. https://partner.example.com/v1, and require HTTPS for production external endpoints.
Set debug to false in the production configuration.
